overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through a rain-soaked futuristic city at night. The vehicle navigates neon-lit streets, intersections, and elevated highways while passing holographic advertisements and towering skyscrapers.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person driving view through a rain-soaked futuristic city street at night. Neon lights illuminate the glass skyscrapers lining both sides of the road as the vehicle approaches an intersection, following a yellow truck and passing a police vehicle in the adjacent lane.

segments.scene_description: Driving through the commercial district, the vehicle passes holographic billboards and futuristic street lamps. The wet asphalt reflects the neon lights as the car approaches and crosses an intersection with distinctive yellow crosswalk markings, with an overpass visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: navigating through the major intersection and turning onto a street lined with large digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a wide intersection surrounded by elevated highway structures, then turns right onto a street dominated by massive digital billboards including one displaying 'FREE YOUR MIND'. The scene transitions from enclosed street to open intersection and back to a commercial corridor.

segments.scene_description: Driving along an elevated highway, the vehicle approaches and passes under a dramatic purple neon underpass. Large holographic advertisements including one reading 'PLUG IN NOW' line the right side, while the wet road surface reflects the vibrant magenta and blue lighting.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered checkpoint area, transitioning from the open highway to a sheltered toll plaza. Overhead neon strips provide artificial lighting as the car slows down approaching the toll gates and checkpoint barriers, with a small toll booth building visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person driving perspective through a rain-soaked futuristic city, moving from a dense corridor of skyscrapers into a wide, neon-drenched commercial intersection. It begins by navigating a narrow street lined with glass towers, following a yellow truck and passing a police vehicle under the glow of city lights. As the vehicle pushes further into the commercial district, the wet asphalt begins to mirror towering holographic billboards and futuristic street lamps before the car crosses a marked yellow intersection. The scene then opens up into a vast junction surrounded by elevated highway structures, where the camera turns right into a corridor dominated by massive digital displays. Finally, the view settles on a towering billboard reading FREE YOUR MIND as the vehicle transitions from the open intersection back into the heart of the commercial district.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle moves from an open, neon-drenched highway into a sheltered urban checkpoint. It begins by gliding along an elevated road, passing under a dramatic purple underpass where the wet asphalt reflects vibrant magenta and blue light. As the vehicle proceeds, large holographic advertisements, including one reading PLUG IN NOW, flicker along the right side of the path. The scene then shifts from the open air into a covered toll plaza, where the expansive city lights are replaced by the artificial glow of overhead neon strips. Finally, the camera slows as it approaches the toll gates and checkpoint barriers, passing a small toll booth building on the right.
